name: trustlayer
description: TrustLayer — risk analysis tool for digital content. NOT a truth detector.

scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace backend run lint --if-present && npm --workspace frontend run lint --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace backend run test --if-present && npm --workspace frontend run test --if-present
